activities_projects.title: Square Division Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Explore multiple ways to divide a square into equal areas
steps: Draw a square on chart paper
Divide it into four equal areas in at least three different ways
Explain why each part has equal area

activities_projects.title: Spiral Tube Area Investigation
steps: Draw a spiral-shaped tube on graph paper

activities_projects.title: Triangle Between Parallel Lines
activities_projects.objective: Explore triangles with same base and height
steps: Draw a parallel line above it
Construct multiple triangles with same base

activities_projects.title: Rhombus Dissection Project
steps: Rearrange pieces to form a rectangle

activities_projects.title: Trapezium to Parallelogram Activity
steps: Join them to form a parallelogram

activities_projects.title: Quadrilateral Area Exploration
steps: Calculate area of two triangles and add them

activities_projects.title: Hexagon Area Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Break complex shapes into known figures
steps: Divide it into triangles or trapeziums

activities_projects.title: Perimeter vs Area Proof Activity
activities_projects.objective: Show shapes with same perimeter but different area
steps: Draw two rectangles with same perimeter

activities_projects.title: Area Scaling Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study area growth when dimensions increase
steps: Draw squares with side 2 cm, 4 cm, and 6 cm
